title: OmniProject RAG/health band vocabulary entry
description: One canonical RAG/health reporting band (Red/Amber/Green), authored as a single JSON array (assets/rag-vocabulary.json), validated element-by-element against this schema and embedded by gen-rag-vocabulary. Every band binds to an internal ordinal `level` — the health band the roll-up maths key off. This is the DISPLAY/relabel layer for the bands; the 3-way classifier (classifyRag → GREEN/AMBER/RED) stays in code and is UNCHANGED.

label.description: The base/default label (the authoring language, e.g. "Green" — a scope may relabel it to "On Track").

labels.description: Optional per-locale translations of the label (BCP-47 key → text, e.g. { "de": "Grün", "en-GB": "Green" }). A viewer sees labels[theirLocale] ?? labels[lang] ?? label, so the same screen renders in each user's language.

level.description: The internal ordinal BAND this health token binds to (1 = worst / Red … ascending to healthiest / Green) — the invariant the ordering/filtering maths key off, kept SEPARATE from `order` (display position). The three shipped bands ARE the anchors (red=1, amber=2, green=3); an adjustable band declares which ordinal it binds to. Note classifyRag's own GREEN/AMBER/RED mapping is fixed in code — this vocabulary re-skins the bands, it does not redefine the classifier.

color.description: Swatch colour as a 6-digit hex (rendered via inline style, so a custom band can carry any colour). Absent ⇒ a neutral swatch.

methodologies.description: Methodology tags this band belongs to ('*' = neutral / all). Selecting a methodology surfaces its tagged bands, so each methodology can carry its own normal nomenclature. Absent ⇒ neutral.
